title: rubus rubratus
intro: Rubus rubratus, also known as the red-bracted raspberry or Himalayan raspberry, is a species of raspberry that is native to the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus rubratus include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of Rubus rubratus include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
